description: Hand-authored retrieval relevance judgments. Each query has zero or more relevant chunks identified by (source_filename, chunk_ord). The harness resolves these to chunk ids by hashing the file and reading the document/chunk rows.

queries.query: Initech Components invoice total amount due
queries.note: Initech appears on two invoices; both are relevant. Exercises recall@k > precision@k cap.

queries.query: Stark Manufacturing invoice issued in October 2026
